mapper.select: SELECT id, name, document_type, form_fields::text AS form_fields, created_at FROM gw_approval_templates ORDER BY id

SELECT d.id, d.template_id, d.document_type, d.title, d.content, d.form_data::text AS form_data, d.status, d.applicant_id, d.created_at, d.submitted_at, d.completed_at, d.rejection_reason, u.name AS applicant_name, t.name AS template_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_approval_lines WHERE document_id = d.id) AS total_lines, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_approval_lines WHERE document_id = d.id AND status = 'APPROVED') AS approved_lines FROM gw_approval_documents d JOIN itsm_users u ON d.applicant_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_approval_templates t ON d.template_id = t.id WHERE d.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_approval_documents (template_id, document_type, title, content, form_data, status, applicant_id) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{documentType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{formData}::jsonb, #{status}, #{applicantId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM gw_approval_documents WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.select: SELECT al.id, al.document_id, al.approver_id, al.sequence, al.status, al.approved_at, al.comment, al.delegated_to, al.created_at, u.name AS approver_name, gd.name AS approver_department, du.name AS delegated_to_name FROM gw_approval_lines al JOIN itsm_users u ON al.approver_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_user_profiles gup ON gup.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_departments gd ON gup.department_id = gd.id LEFT JOIN itsm_users du ON al.delegated_to = du.id WHERE al.document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY al.sequence

SELECT al.id, al.document_id, al.approver_id, al.sequence, al.status, al.approved_at, al.comment, al.delegated_to, al.created_at, u.name AS approver_name FROM gw_approval_lines al JOIN itsm_users u ON al.approver_id = u.id WHERE al.id = #{id}

SELECT al.id, al.document_id, al.approver_id, al.sequence, al.status, al.approved_at, al.comment, al.delegated_to, al.created_at FROM gw_approval_lines al WHERE al.document_id = #{documentId} AND al.approver_id = #{approverId} AND al.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY al.sequence LIMIT 1

SELECT al.id, al.document_id, al.approver_id, al.sequence, al.status, al.approved_at, al.comment, al.delegated_to, al.created_at, u.name AS approver_name FROM gw_approval_lines al JOIN itsm_users u ON al.approver_id = u.id WHERE al.document_id = #{documentId} AND al.sequence > #{sequence} ORDER BY al.sequence LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_approval_lines (document_id, approver_id, sequence, status) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{approverId}, #{sequence}, 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_approval_lines WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_approval_lines WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND status = 'APPROVED'

SELECT d.id, d.template_id, d.document_type, d.title, d.content, d.form_data::text AS form_data, d.status, d.applicant_id, d.created_at, d.submitted_at, d.completed_at, d.rejection_reason, u.name AS applicant_name, t.name AS template_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_approval_lines WHERE document_id = d.id) AS total_lines, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_approval_lines WHERE document_id = d.id AND status = 'APPROVED') AS approved_lines FROM gw_approval_documents d JOIN itsm_users u ON d.applicant_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_approval_templates t ON d.template_id = t.id WHERE d.status = 'SUBMITTED' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gw_approval_lines WHERE document_id = d.id AND approver_id = #{approverId} AND status = 'PENDING' ) ORDER BY d.submitted_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_approval_history (document_id, action, actor_id, comment) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{action}, #{actorId}, #{comment})
